title: The Demon of the Hidden Mist

steps.text: A cold mist rolls across the Great Naruto Bridge. Two figures wait at the far end — one massive, one slight.

steps.speaker: Zabuza
steps.text: You children play at war. But this? This is the reality of the shinobi world. Cold. Merciless.

steps.speaker: Haku
steps.text: I'm sorry. I won't let you pass. For my master, I will become a true weapon.

steps.speaker: Sakura
steps.text: Naruto, Sasuke — look out, he's fast!

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: I don't care how strong you are! I'm not letting anyone else get hurt — even if I have to break every scroll I own!

boss.victory_text: Haku falls shielding his master; Zabuza falls at his side. They were people — not tools. The mist clears.
